creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
The upstream reaction of the libjpeg-turbo guys shows they care a shit about compatibility, making it unreliable.

https://github.com/libjpeg-turbo/libjpeg-turbo/issues/767#issuecomment-2136105580

I am asking for a formal decision of portmgr@ to deprecate libjpeg-turbo and replace it by something reliable.
